x.description_summary: Input tensor whose dimensions will be permuted.

perm.description_summary: Permutation vector of dimension indices specifying the new order of the axes.

T.description_summary: Data type of the input tensor x (and the output).

Tperm.description_summary: Data type of the permutation tensor perm.

llm_reasoning: Documentation only states that output has the same rank as input with no specific rank required, so the primary data tensor x can have any rank.
